action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_info
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the trip, including the group composition (seniors, adults, toddlers), starting location, and the remaining budget allocation.

action_set_definitions.name: check_poi_status
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the operational status of specific infrastructure at a Point of Interest (POI).

feature_name.description: Specific feature to check (e.g., 'primary accessibility elevator').

action_set_definitions.name: search_activities
action_set_definitions.description: Searches for available activities, tours, or tickets in a specific city with details on cost and accessibility.

action_set_definitions.name: calculate_transport_cost
action_set_definitions.description: Calculates the transport cost and travel time for a specific group size and distance.

action_set_definitions.name: validate_itinerary_constraints
action_set_definitions.description: Simulates a proposed plan to check budget, Group Cohesion Index (GCI), and mandatory shoulder buffers. Validates time gaps between arrival, activities, and departure.

arrival_time.description: Time the group arrives at the first city destination (e.g., '09:00').

shoulder_buffer_mins.description: Mandatory gap required between every transition.

action_set_definitions.name: finalize_itinerary
action_set_definitions.description: Confirms and books the final plan for the specified day.

state_description.itinerary_list: A chronological list of all confirmed bookings and activities.
state_description.total_budget: The total monetary limit for the entire trip.
state_description.spent_amount: The total amount of money spent so far based on bookings.
state_description.current_city_position: The current geographical location of the traveler at the end of the current planned itinerary.
state_description.trip_duration_days: The total number of days planned for the trip.
state_description.booked_time_slots: A list of occupied time ranges to prevent scheduling overlaps.
state_description.traveler_preferences: Specific user constraints like dietary needs, preferred hotel star rating, or airline loyalty.

itinerary_list.event: Chianti Wine Tour (Seniors remained at Villa)
Villa Rest Day & Private Cooking Class
